headline: Couple's 'Relationship Reset' Is Just Them Deleting Each Other's Phone Numbers, Then Re-Adding, Then Fighting
summary: The cycle continues monthly. Their therapist has a bingo card. 'It's progress,' they said. 'It's not,' the therapist said.
fullBody: Megan and Jake Reset have a ritual: fight, delete number, add number, fight again. 'We're working on boundaries,' Megan said. 'Via deletion,' Jake added. Their therapist asked them to 'talk in person.' 'That's what the block button is for,' Megan said. The therapist quit. 'I can't help them,' the therapist said. Megan and Jake are now 'taking a break.' 'From each other or from phones?' their friend asked. 'Yes,' they said.
